hero_subtitle: SFTY organizes jurisdiction-specific VARA reporting by connecting provider outputs, managing case workflows, and preserving audit evidence for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance reporting slows with disconnected workflows
problem_description: VARA-facing compliance teams struggle to assemble and track reporting evidence across fragmented tools and manual processes. This results in slow report preparation, weak traceability, and challenges in meeting jurisdiction-specific VARA requirements consistently.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY combines provider outputs, internal reviews, regulatory changes and case evidence into one structured workflow that helps VASPs prepare VARA reports efficiently with clear traceability and audit readiness.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to VARA reporting
workflow_description: SFTY structures provider checks, rules, cases, decisions and evidence into a clear workflow that supports VARA regulatory reporting and audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. VARA compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY structures VARA-specific compliance workflows by connecting provider outputs into decision logs, cases, evidence packages and audit-ready reporting for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured VARA reporting, combining provider outputs and audit evidence into a controlled, scalable environment for bank due diligence and deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how VARA-specific cases and evidence are managed operationally
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit trails support VARA compliance and reporting readiness
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs connect to VARA reporting and review
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VARA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VARA compliance teams connect jurisdiction-specific workflows, regulatory rules, cases and evidence into one operational layer tailored for digital asset businesses under VARA oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support VARA reporting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures VARA reporting by linking Travel Rule, onboarding, screening and case data into consistent review, draft reports and submission-ready evidence packages for compliance teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve VARA audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence by recording decision logs, case histories and provider outputs to support review readiness and traceability for VARA regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into connected compliance workflows without replacing current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace VARA regulatory providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace regulatory or compliance providers but connects their outputs to form structured VARA workflows, improving operational efficiency and evidence management.
final_title: Structure VARA reporting into audit-ready workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs, case records and evidence for VARA-facing compliance teams managing regulated workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
